name: process_absence_call_in
description: Orchestrates a complete call-in event by unassigning the shift, updating the accrual balance, and recording the earning code for payroll.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier of the employee calling in.

requiredFields.name: shift_id
requiredFields.label: Shift ID
requiredFields.description: The ID of the scheduled shift the employee is missing.

requiredFields.name: earning_code
requiredFields.label: Earning Code
requiredFields.description: The classification code for the absence type.

requiredFields.name: absence_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Absence
requiredFields.description: The calendar date the employee is calling in for.

confirmationMessage: You are about to process a call-in for Employee {{employee_id}} on {{absence_date}}. This will convert the shift to 'Open', deduct hours from the relevant accrual balance, and log the time as {{earning_code}} for payroll.
successMessage: Successfully processed call-in for {{employee_id}}. Shift {{shift_id}} is now open for coverage and payroll staging has been updated.

name: convert_shift_to_open
description: Removes an assigned employee from a shift and marks it as an open shift available for coverage.

requiredFields.name: shift_id
requiredFields.label: Shift ID
requiredFields.description: The identifier of the shift to be opened.

requiredFields.name: reason
requiredFields.label: Reason for Opening
requiredFields.description: Note explaining why the shift is being unassigned (e.g., Call-in, Leave of Absence).

confirmationMessage: You are about to remove the assigned employee from Shift {{shift_id}} and change its status to 'Open'.
successMessage: Successfully converted Shift {{shift_id}} to an open shift.

name: adjust_accrual_balance
description: Manually increases or decreases an employee's accrued time off balance.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The employee whose balance needs adjustment.

requiredFields.name: accrual_type
requiredFields.label: Accrual Type
requiredFields.description: The specific accrual bucket to adjust.

requiredFields.name: adjustment_hours
requiredFields.label: Hours to Add/Subtract
requiredFields.description: The number of hours (use negative for deductions).

confirmationMessage: You are about to adjust the {{accrual_type}} balance for {{employee_id}} by {{adjustment_hours}} hours.
successMessage: Successfully updated accrual balance for {{employee_id}}. New balance is now reflected in the ledger.

name: update_payroll_earning_code
description: Updates the earning code classification for a specific absence record to ensure correct pay calculation.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The employee associated with the record.

requiredFields.name: record_date
requiredFields.label: Effective Date
requiredFields.description: The date of the absence record.

confirmationMessage: You are about to update the payroll record for {{employee_id}} on {{record_date}} to use earning code {{new_earning_code}}.
successMessage: Successfully updated earning code to {{new_earning_code}} for the specified record.

name: post_urgent_coverage_request
description: Flags an open shift as high priority and notifies eligible staff to fill the vacancy.

requiredFields.name: notification_group
requiredFields.label: Target Group
requiredFields.description: The group of employees to notify.

confirmationMessage: You are about to mark Shift {{shift_id}} as 'Urgent' and send coverage notifications to the {{notification_group}} group.
successMessage: Shift {{shift_id}} has been flagged as urgent and notifications have been dispatched.
